creator: theis@gmx.at
text:
Thanks, I wasn't Aware of the "maintainer approved" Checkbox.

portlint is OK, though it gives me one warning about using an absolute path "/var/db/${PORTNAME}" for the Location of fail2ban's database, but if I change that to "${STAGEDIR}/var/db/${PORTNAME}" I get an error during Installation that lstat fails.

poudriere is OK.
